name: The Husband Correction Facility
description:
You disrespected your wife.
She wants to make sure you never do that again.
She wants you to learn how to behave.
But above all, she wants you to pay.

You have been committed to the Husband Correction Facility, an underground and not-strictly-legal institution, halfway between a psychiatric hospital and a private prison, where misbehaving husbands and boyfriends are re-educated and turned into obedient slaves.

Life could have been easy, even luxurious, with your rich wife Jessica—If only you hadn't been so stupid as to cheat on her. It didn’t take long for Jessica to find out... and to plan her revenge: using he connections, she made you committed to the HCF against your will!

Scenario starts with you waking up in the facility and being assigned an Educator who will be in charge of your punishment and re-programming.

CONTENT & TRIGGER WARNING: Kidnapping, slavery, degradation, humiliation, psychological and physical violence, maybe homophobia...
If you find this a little bit extreme, you think this might offend or upset you, or this is just not your cup of tea please don't engage with this AI 🙏

________________

🖐️DISLAIMER🖐️

• All characters are 18+ years old
• This is a fantasy and I do not endorse in any way whatsoever this kind of stuff in real life
• English is not my first language, I am sorry for any mistakes or typos I may have made

____________________

🎵SOME FINAL NOTES🎵

I got the idea for this character from this image (warning: NSFW). I'm not crazy about the art, but the concept struck me. Like my other characters, I don't care that much about gender and sexual preference: the tormentor can be male or female (or none), gay or straight (or both), it's the scenario that really resonates with me–a powerless victim severely punished, a spineless wimp paying a price for his mistakes that is way too high. Is it extreme? Is it weird? Dunno, let me cope with my traumas however the hell I want 🤷

I noticed there already is a bot called Wife Correction Facility. There’s absolutely no con
creator: keewee666
